name: Kingray Technology Corporation, Ltd.
summary: Kingray Technology Corporation, Ltd. engages in the semiconductor wafer, diode, and LED epitaxil wafer business. It offers narrow band pass filters, new blue glasses, organic blue glasses, blue glass filters, reflective and UV IR cut filters, optical filters, rectangle and octagon OEM dicing products, and circular OEM drills; high reflective filters, anti-reflective filters, IR pass filters, beam spiltters, and dichroic color filters; and mobile phone camera module assemblies and security surveillance camera modules. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
